11th Jul 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● Iran’s Judiciary Chief declared that Tehran will pursue accountability for alleged war crimes committed by US & Israel during recent conflicts, seeking punishment & compensation for damages incurred.

END OF THE BRIEF

On Instagram, a narrative that the Chinese Army has entered Arunachal and captured 60 km of Indian territory is gaining traction.

I have counted almost 9-10 million views collectively on those reels. It appears to be a cheap paid job, using footage of the Royal Thai Army and depicting it as the Chinese Army, combined with some footage from Manipur to make it more dramatic.

It has been going on for around 7-8 days. I have been closely monitoring it and watching how quickly the Indian Army responds, since it is gaining traction.

The response came 3 days later from an official Indian Army fact-checking handle.

Guess the number of views - approx 19,000 by the time I am writing this post.

The Chinese will cook us so well in IW that the Indian Armed Forces will spend half a decade just fact-checking them!

Good luck, gentlemen.

tweets.title: On Instagram, a narrative that the Chinese Army has entered Arunachal and captured 60 km of Indian territory is gaining traction. I have counted almost 9-10 million views collectively on those reels. It appears to be a cheap paid job, using footage of the Royal Thai Army and depicting it as the Chinese Army, combined with some footage from Manipur to make it more dramatic. It has been going on for around 7-8 days. I have been closely monitoring it and watching how quickly the Indian Army responds, since it is gaining traction. The response came 3 days later from an official Indian Army fact-checking handle. Guess the number of views - approx 19,000 by the time I am writing this post. The Chinese will cook us so well in IW that the Indian Armed Forces will spend half a decade just fact-checking them! Good luck, gentlemen.

tweets.title: DEFENCE MINISTER RAJNATH SINGH: INDIAN NAVY PROTECTED ₹9,000 CRORE IN CARGO DURING WEST ASIA CRISIS At the commissioning of INS Mahendragiri in Visakhapatnam, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh said the Indian Navy, through Operation Urja Suraksha, safely escorted 18 merchant vessels carrying essential cargo worth over ₹9,000 crore during the West Asia conflict. He also reiterated India's vision of "MAHA SAGAR" (Mutual and Holistic Advancement for Security and Growth Across Regions), stating that the Indian Navy has emerged as a "net security provider" and a trusted partner in the Indo-Pacific, with a proven record in HADR missions, anti-piracy operations, and evacuation missions.
tweets.content:
DEFENCE MINISTER RAJNATH SINGH: INDIAN NAVY PROTECTED ₹9,000 CRORE IN CARGO DURING WEST ASIA CRISIS

At the commissioning of INS Mahendragiri in Visakhapatnam, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh said the Indian Navy, through Operation Urja Suraksha, safely escorted 18 merchant vessels carrying essential cargo worth over ₹9,000 crore during the West Asia conflict.

He also reiterated India's vision of "MAHA SAGAR" (Mutual and Holistic Advancement for Security and Growth Across Regions), stating that the Indian Navy has emerged as a "net security provider" and a trusted partner in the Indo-Pacific, with a proven record in HADR missions, anti-piracy operations, and evacuation missions.

tweets.content:
VERY INTERESTING SPACE STARTUP - @astrobase_space

Only ONE full-flow staged combustion (ffsc) rocket engine has ever flown - SpaceX's Raptor.

-only 7 have run on a test stand, anywhere, in history.
-ISRO has never attempted the cycle.
-Bengaluru startup (founded '24) is trying this!

Astrobase wants an 800 kN FFSC methane engine
-7 of them under a reusable rocket
-and orbit by 2029.

BUT ffsc is the Everest of engine cycles:
-2 pre-burners instead of one
-all propellant turned to hot gas before it meets in the chamber
-Rewards: extreme chamber pressures (Raptor exceeds 300 bar), top-tier efficiency, engines that can fly hundreds of times

What Astrobase has actually demonstrated:
-sub-scale hot fire, September 2025
-successful on the first attempt, per the company
-21.5-acre test site at Anantapur with a 200-tonne stand
-India's first private high-thrust LOX-methane facility

CREDIBLE TEAM
- Selected June 2026 for IN-SPACe's ₹500-crore Technology Adoption Fund
-3 winners from 43 applicants; ₹25 crore cap)
-backing its own engine design
-no ISRO blueprint changing hands

Can they pull it off? Is it workable? Do they have the money to make it possible? How much of this is actually real? Isn't it too early to say anything?
